name: RAG chatbot with retrieval augmented generation
description: Uses Exa search to retrieve relevant knowledge for a user question, then Claude AI synthesizes an answer grounded in the retrieved sources. Posts the result to Slack with Block Kit formatting including source attribution.

source.originalName: Local chatbot with retrieval augmented generation (RAG)

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search retrieval

question.description: User question to answer using RAG

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the answer

steps.name: Search for relevant knowledge via Exa
